title: AMQP 0-9-1 Model, Virtual Hosts, Exchanges, Queues, and Bindings · Changed-Schema Lab
summary: An independent integration team receives different traffic, tenant, topology, schema, and failure constraints and transfers amqp 0-9-1 model, virtual hosts, exchanges, queues, and bindings into a new AMQP entity and routing graph. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of AMQP entity and routing graph with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles.
Use virtual hosts as separate topology and permission namespaces while recognizing they are not complete process or resource isolation.
Derive destination sets from exchange type, routing key, binding key, headers, and exchange-to-exchange bindings.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqp Entity Model
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab messaging team handles case 3067 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then introduce a sequence gap for one partition while another stays healthy. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqp Entity Model.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace producers, connections, channels, exchanges, bindings, queues, consumers, deliveries, and acknowledgements without collapsing their roles. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Commit to the mission model · Lab Amqp Entity Model, keep Amqp Entity Model connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. hints: For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Lab Amqp Error Scope, name the types, ownership, and stop path, Amqp Error Scope precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Lab Amqp Error Scope, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A lab messaging team handles case 5923 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then reuse one message identity with a different payload fingerprint. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify connection-level, channel-level, topology precondition, return, confirm, and consumer cancellation outcomes by recovery scope.

For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Test an acceptance boundary · Lab Amqp Error Scope, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: Every AMQP error requires terminating the process and rebuilding the entire connection.

stimulus.title: Amqp Error Scope failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed
lines.text: Every AMQP error requires terminating the process and rebuilding the entire connection.

lines.label: required
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Classify connection-level, channel-level, topology precondition, return, confirm, and consumer cancellation outcomes by recovery scope.

options.text: Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.
Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Amqp Error Scope condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder. That claim does not survive the test an acceptance boundary evidence boundary.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Defend the transferred model · Lab Amqp Error Scope
steps.instruction:
Write the lab evidence note for Amqp Error Scope: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A lab messaging team handles case 4304 in a consumer fleet under a shared dependency outage. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to derive zero, one, or many queue destinations from exchange and binding evidence; keep credentials and connection URLs out of learner output; then exhaust the retry age before the attempt count reaches its maximum. Browser code models pure messaging decisions only. amqplib, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, external effects, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Classify connection-level, channel-level, topology precondition, return, confirm, and consumer cancellation outcomes by recovery scope.

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and TypeScript Defend the transferred model · Lab Amqp Error Scope.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For RabbitMQ and TypeScript Defend the transferred model · Lab Amqp Error Scope, keep Amqp Error Scope connected to executable TypeScript messaging decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Classify connection-level, channel-level, topology precondition, return, confirm, and consumer cancellation outcomes by recovery scope.
